sourceScope.primarySourceFile: NY Regulations/2021 VLM Report_DRAFT-(1-27-2020) with academy Updates V1-Reg-102-11-NYCRR-S127.pdf
sourceScope.sourceTitle: Reinsurance Transactions by Authorized Life Insurers and Certain Other Authorized Insurers
sourceScope.sourceStatusNote: Current through March 15, 2020; section 127.5 is repealed and should remain boundary context only; page-image wording backstop remains required because the text layer is noisy / OCR-like.

observedSectionWindows.note: Title page, preamble, scope, reinsurance-credit rules, and repealed closeout.

boundaries: Keep planning focused on this single Regulation 102 PDF.
Do not widen into AG files, practice notes, or other NY regulation files in the same wave.
Keep the opening preamble / scope / reinsurance-credit / repealed closeout language review-only until a human confirms the indexing decision.
Keep the page-image wording backstop visible because the text layer is noisy / OCR-like.
Keep the batch source-bound and review-only.
exclusions: No eLearning scripts, slides, quizzes, or app exports.
No raw source files in Git.
No other guideline files in the same wave.

topicMap.label: Opening preamble, scope, reinsurance-credit rules, and repealed closeout
topicMap.boundaryNote: Keep this slice within pages 1-8 and do not absorb other NY regulation files.

proposedBatches.title: Regulation 102 opening preamble, scope, reinsurance-credit rules, and repealed closeout

pageTarget.notes: Capture the full eight-page regulation as a single review-only slice and stop at the page 8 boundary.

proposedBatches.rationale: Capture the full eight-page regulation as a single review-only slice and stop at the page 8 boundary.

reviewStandards.regulatoryRequirement: Treat the preamble, scope, reserve-credit, and repealed closeout language as regulatory text when it directs what the company must do.
reviewStandards.definitionOrTerminology: Treat reinsurance, reserve credit, ceding insurer, and related terms as terminology when the text explains rather than directs.
reviewStandards.crossReferenceMapping: Treat references to Insurance Law, section 127.2, section 127.3, and related statutory material as cross-reference context unless operationalized.
reviewStandards.backgroundContent: Treat the title page and section labels as background unless they impose a requirement.
reviewStandards.boundaryControlWindow: Treat the eight-page slice as a review-only window that should not be merged forward.
reviewStandards.requiresHumanInterpretation: Treat the indexing choice and the noisy OCR-like text layer as requiring human actuarial interpretation unless the text is explicit.
reviewStandards.sourceQualityCaveat: Treat text-layer noise or encoding issues as review-only caveats and do not widen the batch because of them.

appReady: export is sanitized, stable, and versioned

notes: Controlled Regulation 102 planning artifact. Planned batch 267 remains review-only by default and is not an extraction run.
